text:
On Mon, Jun 26, 2000 at 12:43:33PM -0700, brad@kazrak.com wrote:
> 'make clean' in /usr/ports fails with 'Don't know how to make clean' errors
> in the following ports:
>    korean/afterstep
>    korean/fvwm95
>    korean/vim

I've removed these ports from their category Makefile, so ``make clean''
should work fine now.
